## 🥩 Don't Starve Together Context
- [ ] This affects **Single Shard (Surface Only)**
- [ ] This affects **Multi-Shard (Master + Caves)**
- [ ] This is a general Docker/Script/CI improvement

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation update

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] Manual container boot test (Single Shard)
- [ ] Manual container boot test (Master + Caves Shard)
- [ ] Shard communication link verification (Caves connecting to Master)
- [ ] Steam Workshop Mod downloading check
- [ ] Permissions check (UID/GID 1000 steam user ownership)

## 🏁 Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings (Linting passes)
